title: Warning of 'tsunami of chronic disease' as dialysis units ration care
description: Dialysis units across Australia and New Zealand are being forced to ration lifesaving care for patients with kidney failure, according to a major new report which has warned of a "significant threat" to patient safety.
content:
Exhausted and depleted from kidney disease, Sarah Latham would often need to pull over to sleep as she drove hours across regional New South Wales to access lifesaving dialysis.
For more than four y… [+6365 chars]
de: Warnung vor „Tsunami chronischer Krankheiten“, da Dialyseeinheiten die Versorgung rationieren. Dialyseeinrichtungen in ganz Australien und Neuseeland sind gezwungen, die lebensrettende Versorgung von Patienten mit Nierenversagen zu rationieren, heißt es in einem wichtigen neuen Bericht, der vor einer „erheblichen Bedrohung“ für die Patientensicherheit warnt.
en: Warning of 'tsunami of chronic disease' as dialysis units ration care. Dialysis units across Australia and New Zealand are being forced to ration lifesaving care for patients with kidney failure, according to a major new report which has warned of a "significant threat" to patient safety.
la: Monitum de 'tsunami morborum chronicorum' cum dialysi unitatum ratione curationis. Dialysis unitates trans Australiam et Novam Zelandiam ratiocinari coguntur ad curationem viventis de aegris renibus defectus, secundum maiorem novam relationem quae denuntiavit "minae significans" ad salutem patientis.

title: “Near-miss” Tsunami in Alaskan Cruise Area Offers Lessons for Steep Landscapes Near Glaciers
description: The study also points to broader lessons: as glaciers retreat in warming regions, the risk of related hazards can increase, and improved monitoring may help reduce some of those dangers.
content:
Adapted from a story written by Colette Derworiz for the University of Calgary
<ul><li>A huge landslide in Alaskas Tracy Arm fjord triggered a tsunami whose water ran 1,500 feet up the opposite wall… [+4870 chars]
de: „Beinahe-Unfall“-Tsunami im Kreuzfahrtgebiet Alaska bietet Lehren für steile Landschaften in der Nähe von Gletschern. Die Studie weist auch auf umfassendere Lehren hin: Mit dem Rückgang der Gletscher in sich erwärmenden Regionen kann das Risiko damit verbundener Gefahren zunehmen, und eine verbesserte Überwachung kann dazu beitragen, einige dieser Gefahren zu verringern.
en: “Near-miss” Tsunami in Alaskan Cruise Area Offers Lessons for Steep Landscapes Near Glaciers. The study also points to broader lessons: as glaciers retreat in warming regions, the risk of related hazards can increase, and improved monitoring may help reduce some of those dangers.
la: "Prope-miss" Tsunami in Area Cruise Alaskan Lectiones praebet pro Arduus Landscapes Prope Glaciers. Studium etiam latioribus lectionibus demonstrat: sicut molibus in regionibus calefaciendis recedunt, periculum affinium periculorum augeri potest, et magna vigilantia emendari aliquos ex illis periculis adiuvari potest.

title: Alaska’s near-record landslide tsunami sent a wave 1,580 feet up the fjord walls – and left clues for building a warning system
description: The tsunami struck just 12 hours after a cruise ship had left the fjord, rattling the tourism industry.
content:
The Tracy Arm landslide sent a tsunami wave far up the opposite side of the fjord near South Sawyer Glacier. John Lyons/U.S. Geological Survey
On the evening of Aug. 9, 2025, passengers on the Hanse… [+8418 chars]
de: Der fast rekordverdächtige Erdrutsch-Tsunami in Alaska schickte eine Welle 1.580 Fuß die Fjordwände hinauf – und hinterließ Hinweise für den Aufbau eines Warnsystems. Der Tsunami ereignete sich nur zwölf Stunden, nachdem ein Kreuzfahrtschiff den Fjord verlassen hatte, und erschütterte die Tourismusbranche.
en: Alaska’s near-record landslide tsunami sent a wave 1,580 feet up the fjord walls – and left clues for building a warning system. The tsunami struck just 12 hours after a cruise ship had left the fjord, rattling the tourism industry.
la: Alaska's prope-recordum tsunami undam 1,580 pedes moenium fjordi misit – et reliquit clues ad systema monitivum aedificandum. Tsunami tantum XII horis percussit postquam lecythus fjord reliquerat, collisione voluptuaria similesve industriae.

title: Alaska landslide set off CN Tower-sized tsunami last year — and a warning for B.C.
description: When millions of tonnes of rock fell one kilometre into an Alaskan fiord last year, it set off one of the largest tsunamis ever recorded, a monstrous 481-metre wave higher than the tallest viewing platform of the CN Tower, a new study shows.
content: When millions of tonnes of rock fell one kilometre into an Alaskan fiord last year, it set off one of the largest tsunamis ever recorded, a monstrous 481-metre wave higher than the tallest viewing pl… [+3555 chars]
de: Ein Erdrutsch in Alaska löste letztes Jahr einen Tsunami in der Größe des CN Tower aus – und eine Warnung für B.C.. Als letztes Jahr Millionen Tonnen Gestein einen Kilometer in einen Fjord in Alaska fielen, löste er einen der größten jemals aufgezeichneten Tsunamis aus, eine monströse 481 Meter hohe Welle, die höher war als die höchste Aussichtsplattform des CN Tower, wie eine neue Studie zeigt.
en: Alaska landslide set off CN Tower-sized tsunami last year — and a warning for B.C.. When millions of tonnes of rock fell one kilometre into an Alaskan fiord last year, it set off one of the largest tsunamis ever recorded, a monstrous 481-metre wave higher than the tallest viewing platform of the CN Tower, a new study shows.
la: Alaska lapsus ab CN turri amplitudo tsunami anno proximo profectus est — et admonitio de B.C.. Cum decies centena millia amphorarum petrarum unum chiliometra in Vaelan fiord anno praeterito cecidit, unum ex maximis tsunamis memoriae proditum est, monstrosum 481 metri unda altior quam longissimi spectandi suggestum CN Turris, novum studium demonstrat.
